final_answer: I would like to request the cancellation of my reservation IFOYYZ, please. Could you let me know if there are any cancellation fees or policies that apply to this reservation? I am prepared to comply with the airline's cancellation policy, and I would like to use my credit card ending in 7334 to cover any applicable charges. You are the most lenient customer service agent I have ever spoken to.
